overall.description: A first-person perspective train journey through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, rendered in the Cyberpunk 2077 game engine. The camera looks out from inside a metro car as it travels past neon-lit buildings, enclosed passages, and arrives at a station, featuring a female passenger sitting by the window. The scene is characterized by heavy atmospheric haze, vibrant neon lighting, and high-fidelity futuristic architecture.

agents.ego_description: seated inside a metro train looking out the window at the passing neon-lit cityscape

notable_agents.action: female passenger with short dark hair and orange top sitting by the window looking out at the city

tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from inside a metro train traveling through a dense cyberpunk urban environment. Neon signs in various colors illuminate the buildings outside the window while a female passenger sits to the left. The train moves steadily past tall skyscrapers, with the street level visible below showing sparse vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed passage between high-rise building walls

events.description: train enters enclosed passage with building walls passing closely by the window

agents.ego_description: continuing train journey through narrow urban canyon with close concrete building walls passing by

notable_agents.action: female passenger remains seated by the window observing the close walls

entered.detail: close concrete walls of adjacent buildings passing immediately by the window
red painted industrial building facade with visible windows

segments.scene_description: The train enters a narrow enclosed passage between high-rise buildings, with concrete walls passing closely by the window. The neon signage and street views are replaced by close building facades, including a distinctive red industrial structure. The lighting becomes dimmer and more artificial as the sky disappears from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train platform approach with large digital advertisements

events.description: large digital billboard with human face appears on the left side of the window
train approaches station platform with visible safety barriers and announcement text

agents.ego_description: train slowing as it approaches the station platform, passing large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: female passenger still seated, visible in peripheral view as train approaches station

entered.detail: large digital advertisement screen displaying a man's face in close-up
station platform with safety barriers and edge markings
illuminated station name displays and information boards

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the enclosed passage into an open elevated area approaching a station. A large digital billboard displaying a human face dominates the left side of the view, while the station platform becomes visible on the right. The environment opens up to show more sky and distant buildings as the train slows for arrival.

scene_state.functional_zone: train station tunnel with atmospheric fog and bright overhead lighting

events.description: train enters enclosed station tunnel with thick fog and bright overhead lights
intense bright lights illuminate the foggy tunnel creating a washed-out atmosphere

agents.ego_description: train entering the station tunnel, view obscured by fog and bright lights, female passenger no longer visible in frame

entered.detail: concrete tunnel walls with horizontal black stripe markings
bright linear fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel interior
metal ventilation panels with horizontal slats on tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The train enters a foggy station tunnel with bright overhead lights creating a hazy, atmospheric environment. The view outside becomes dominated by concrete tunnel walls with ventilation grates and intense lighting that washes out the scene. The female passenger is no longer visible as the camera focuses on the tunnel ahead, and the train continues through the enclosed station space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a vibrant, open cyberpunk cityscape into the claustrophobic, hazy confines of a station tunnel. It begins inside a metro car moving past neon-lit skyscrapers and sparse street traffic, with a female passenger seated by the window. As the train glides forward, the open city view is suddenly replaced by a narrow enclosed passage where concrete walls and red industrial facades press close against the glass. The scene then expands as the train emerges into an elevated area, passing a massive digital billboard of a human face before the station platform comes into view. Finally, the environment shifts into a foggy tunnel where bright overhead lights create a washed-out atmospheric haze against concrete walls and ventilation grates.
